title: Email Sync Plugin
description: Connect Gmail, QQ, Feishu, 163, Yahoo mailboxes and sync to Bitable.
hint: Emails are deduplicated by Message-ID. Only new emails are added, with attachments synced.
schedule.title: Background Scheduled Sync
schedule.subtitle: Schedule Settings
schedule.description: Support multiple mailboxes with scheduled sync including attachments. Sync continues even after closing the plugin.
schedule.tokenPlaceholder: Bitable top-right > More > Get auth token
hint.gmail: Use App Password: Google Account → Security → 2-Step Verification → App Passwords
hint.qq: Use Auth Code: QQ Mail Settings → Account → Enable IMAP → Generate Auth Code
hint.163: Use Auth Code: 163 Mail Settings → POP3/IMAP → Enable IMAP → Create Auth Password
hint.feishu: Use App Password: Feishu Mail Settings → IMAP/SMTP → Create App Password
hint.yahoo: Use App Password: Yahoo Account Security → Generate App Password
hint.outlook: Outlook currently only supports OAuth2 authentication
msg.fillEmailFirst: Please enter your email account and password/auth code first
msg.fillTokenFirst: Please enter your email account and password/auth code above first
msg.fillBaseToken: Please enter the Bitable auth token
msg.quotaExhausted: Free quota of {total} emails exhausted. Upgrade to sync all emails.
msg.noNewEmails: Sync completed, no new emails found
msg.freeLimit: Free version can only sync 3 emails. Upgrade to sync all.
msg.createCheckoutFailed: Cannot create payment link, please try again later
msg.getUserFailed: Cannot get user info. Please open the plugin inside Bitable.
msg.scheduleAdded: Added scheduled sync for {email}, syncing every {interval} hours
msg.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete the scheduled sync for {email}?
